# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

Resources: 
    MyVpcIdParam:   # Parameter for the vpc id, it will be used to reference in other resources later on
        Type : 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value</String>'    
Outputs:          # Outputting VPC ID and Subnets 1 & 2 (SubnetIds) as they are referenced elsewhere.  
    MyVpcIdOutPutKey:     
       Description: "My vpc id"        
       Value: !Ref MyVpcIdParam    
       
    PublicRouteTableIDOutputKey :          # Outputting the public route table ID  (PublicSubnetRtb) as it is referenced elsewhere.  
       Description:"public subnets Route Table Id "          
       Export: 'AWS::CloudFormation::StackArtifact'    
        
    PrivateRouteTableIDOutputKey :          # Outputting the private route table ID (PrivateSubnetRtb) as it is referenced elsewhere.  
        Description:"private subnets Route Table Id"          
       Export: 'AWS::CloudFormation::StackArtifact' 
    
    PublicNatIdOutputKey :          # Outputting the public NAT gateway ID (PublicSubnetRtb) as it is referenced elsewhere.  
        Description:"public subnets Nat Id"          
       Export: 'AWS::CloudFormation::StackArtifact' 
    
    PrivateNatIdOutputKey :          # Outputting the private NAT gateway ID (PrivateSubnetRtb) as it is referenced elsewhere.  
        Description:"private subnets Nat Id"          
       Export: 'AWS::CloudFormation::StackArtifact' 
    
    PublicInternetGatewayIdOutputKey :          # Outputting the public internet gateway ID (PublicSubnetRtb) as it is referenced elsewhere.  
        Description:"public subnets Internet Gateway Id"          
       Export: 'AWS::CloudFormation::StackArtifact' 
    
    PrivateInternetGatewayIdOutputKey :          # Outputting the private internet gateway ID (PrivateSubnetRtb) as it is referenced elsewhere.  
        Description:"private subnets Internet Gateway Id"          
       Export: 'AWS::CloudFormation::StackArtifact'
